nasb.text: Jesus answered and said to him, “Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born again he cannot see the kingdom of God.”

esv.text: Jesus answered him, “Truly, truly, I say to you, unless one is born again  he cannot see the kingdom of God.”

cnv.text: 耶穌回答：“我實實在在告訴你，人若不重生，就不能見　神的國。”

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“我实实在在地告诉你，人若不重生，就不能看见上帝的国。”

csbs.text: 耶稣回答说：“我确确实实地告诉你：一个人如果不重生，就不能见神的国。”
